(V) In Slol<a 55 of Chapter 1 of jataka Pdfijata, valdyanatha
PancHt has taken the usual 31d, 6t11 • 10t11 and 11 tn houses
from the Ascendant as Upachaya houses and the remaining
eight houses as Apachaya houses or houses of suffering.
But he has also mentioned that Apachayas cease to be
Apachayas or houses of suffering if these houses are ocoopied
by their own lords or Mercury, Venus or Jupiter but
unoccupied and unaspected by other planets. House lords
in their own houses are good. Benefics in occupation of evil
houses try to bring out their good significances. Incidentally,
it may be mentioned that Satyacharya has opined that
benefics in all houses ~cept Dusthanas give good effects
while malefics in such a situation give bad effec:ts - the
